tools.name: ruff
tools.run_command: uv run ruff check ci/ tests/
tools.fix_command: uv run ruff check --fix ci/ tests/

tools.name: ruff-format
tools.run_command: uv run ruff format --check ci/ tests/
tools.fix_command: uv run ruff format ci/ tests/

linting.notes: Linting is comprehensive with ruff (replaces flake8, isort, etc.), pyright for type checking, and pre-commit hooks. All tools configured in pyproject.toml with extensive rule selection.

testing.mock_patterns: Uses testcontainers for container-based testing, pyfakefs for filesystem mocking
testing.notes: Tests use testcontainers library and require Docker/Podman. Tests are parametrized with --image flag to test actual container images. Without --image parameter, most tests are skipped. Test suite validates container images (base images for Jupyter notebooks, etc.). Tests require access to container runtime (Docker/Podman socket).

gating_checks.name: pytest-tests
gating_checks.command: uv sync --locked && uv run pre-commit run --all-files && uv run pytest

ci.notes: Primary gating workflow is code-quality.yaml which runs on push, pull_request, and workflow_dispatch. Validates generated code is up-to-date, runs pre-commit hooks, pytest, and validates YAML/JSON/Dockerfiles. Build workflows handle container image building but are more complex.

build.build_command: make all-images (for container images, not Python package)
build.notes: Project uses uv instead of pip/poetry. No traditional Python package build - this repo builds container images. Use 'uv sync --locked' to install dev dependencies. Container images built via Makefile with podman/docker.

conventions.test_naming: test_* functions in Test* classes or standalone
conventions.notes: Follows ruff's import sorting (I rule). Uses type hints with pyright checking. Tests organized in tests/containers/ for container-based tests.

lint_commands.command: uv run ruff check ci/ tests/
lint_commands.notes: Passed with 1 minor warning about invalid noqa comment

lint_commands.command: uv run ruff format --check ci/ tests/

lint_commands.notes: All hooks passed (requires PATH adjustment for pyright hook)

test_commands.notes: 6 passed, 7 skipped (tests require --image parameter to test container images)

container_recipe.notes: UV must be in PATH for pre-commit hooks. Tests use testcontainers and require Docker/Podman runtime. Most image tests skip without --image=<container-image> parameter. Code generation script (scripts/dockerfile_fragments.py) runs cleanly.
